{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220610395133B61455439B5AA577"}"},"total":420},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7561363578874086169","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写得相当有趣呀，虽然是普遍的跟船流，但主角的参与度挺不错的，看样子是无敌旅行跟船流，看甘雨这架势是要成为团宠呀，新人作者也能写这么好相当难得呀。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760520752,"group_id":"7532138420697566233","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9pBvjqQykwSNGqc+8JBSJo=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a731640a1e284084b06f3ddbd50fa765~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706042&x-signature=t5DGYZd3UiHQkw3fLuv6NoIkuHg%3D","user_id":"910048693068669","user_name":"苏打可乐猫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"910048693068669","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7532138420697566233","book_info":{"abstract":"【变单+跟船+无系统】
从东海篇章开始，加入主角团后依旧会按照原著剧情线走，主线剧情不会更改，但每一个小篇章会根据主角加入后带来的蝴蝶效应而适当改变（其中绝大部分对话都是我自己编写的，不会按照原著来）。
甘雨的实力一开始不是无敌，后面会逐渐恢复，不过一直都是船上最强的，但她出手次数不会很多。
本文内容偏轻松，尽量贴合原著风格，快节奏，战斗加日常对话交流。
